The '''''Revenant''''' was a [[EF76 Nebulon-B escort frigate/Legends|EF76 Nebulon-B escort frigate]] that was part of the [[Lumiya's fleet|fleet]] of [[Lumiya]] shortly after the [[Battle of Saijo]]. It was capable of carrying 24 [[TIE/ln space superiority starfighter/Legends|TIE/LN starfighters]].<ref name="Lumiya: Dark Star of the Empire" />

{{Ship-stub}}
